word: H820 - אַשְׁמָן - ʼashmân - ash-mawn' - Desolate place

sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׁמן

Transliteration: 'ashmân

Phonetic: ash-mawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. the stout, among the stout
  2. (CLBL) the desolate, like dead

Origin: probably from H8081

TWOT entry: 2410d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
